final:
// // This module synchronously captures input data on the falling edge of the clock signal and resets the output to one when the reset signal is asserted.
module top_module(
  input clk,
  input rst,
  input [7:0] data_in,
  output reg [7:0] data_out
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (rst) begin
      data_out <= 8'b0;
    end else begin
      data_out <= data_in;
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module synchronously captures input data on the falling edge of the clock signal and resets the output to one when the reset signal is asserted.
